ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Mediterranean Ave.) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property group (e.g., Brown, Light Blue) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to purchase the property */,
  "house_cost" INTEGER /* Cost to build a house on the property */,
  "hotel_cost" INTEGER /* Cost to build a hotel on the property */,
  "total_cost" INTEGER /* Total cost of the property with all improvements */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Rent amount when a player lands on the property */,
  "probability_landing" REAL /* Probability of a player landing on the property */,
  "mortgage_value" INTEGER /* Value of the property when mortgaged */,
  "house_rent" INTEGER /* Rent amount when a house is built */,
  "hotel_rent" INTEGER /* Rent amount when a hotel is built */,
  "is_mortgaged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is mortgaged */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who owns the property (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES property_group ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_group" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the property group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property group */,
  "rent_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier to apply to rent for properties in this group */,
  "description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the property group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for player authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's avatar */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the player is banned */,
  "banned_until" TEXT /* Date and time the player is banned until (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game was created */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., pending, in_progress, finished) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., single_player, multiplayer, tournament) */,
  "max_rounds" INTEGER /* Maximum number of rounds the game can run */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round of the game */,
  "is_tournament" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is part of a tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player" (
  "game_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in a game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "player_color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the player in the game */,
  "initial_cash" INTEGER /* Initial amount of cash the player starts with */,
  "current_cash" INTEGER /* Current amount of cash the player has */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the player on the board */,
  "properties_owned" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of property IDs owned by the player */,
  "is_bankrupt" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the player is bankrupt */,
  "turn_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the player takes turns */,
  "total_rolls" INTEGER /* Total number of dice rolls made by the player */,
  "total_rolls_sum" INTEGER /* Sum of all dice rolls made by the player */,
  "total_rent_paid" INTEGER /* Total rent paid by the player */,
  "total_rent_collected" INTEGER /* Total rent collected by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player making the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, trade, pay_rent) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the transaction (nullable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event in the game history */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., player_move, buy_property, roll_dice) */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event (nullable) */,
  "dice_rolls" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of dice rolls for the event (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_improvements" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property improvement */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "improvement_type" TEXT /* Type of improvement (e.g., house, hotel) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of improvements made */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the improvement */,
  "improvement_status" TEXT /* Status of the improvement (e.g., planned, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_improvements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_improvements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game */,
  "starting_cash" INTEGER /* Starting cash amount for each player */,
  "double_rent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if double rent is enabled */,
  "property_auction" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if property auctions are enabled */,
  "max_rounds" INTEGER /* Maximum number of rounds the game can run */,
  "free_parking_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of money in the Free Parking space */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for properties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player on the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the player */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  "highest_cash" INTEGER /* Highest cash amount achieved by the player */,
  "most_valuable_properties" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the most valuable properties owned by the player */,
  "total_turns_played" INTEGER /* Total number of turns played by the player */,
  "average_turns_per_game" REAL /* Average number of turns per game */,
  "longest_game" INTEGER /* Length of the longest game played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profile" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  "preferred_game_mode" TEXT /* Preferred game mode (e.g., single_player, multiplayer, tournament) */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of achievements */,
  "last_game_played" TEXT /* Date and time of the last game played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_chat" (
  "chat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chat message */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sent the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the chat message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the message is public or private */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the private message (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_chat_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_chat_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES player ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_chat_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game ("game_id")
)
